parties.name: 北京海衡数据科技有限公司

payment_terms.description: 客户应在收到有效发票后七十五日内按季度后付，合同总费用为USD 420,000

breach_liability.content: 服务商累计责任不超过合同履行前三个月已支付的费用，客户的付款义务不受上限限制
客户可提前十日无理由终止合同，服务商仅可在对方发生重大违约且三十日内未予补救时终止合同

dispute_resolution.content: 争议提交新加坡国际仲裁中心（SIAC）仲裁，适用新加坡法律

confidentiality.content: 双方应自保密信息披露之日起两年内承担保密义务

intellectual_property.content: 既有材料归原权利人所有，专为客户开发的工作成果在客户全额付款后转让给客户
intellectual_property.scope: 合同项下的既有材料及专为客户端开发的工作成果

termination.content: 客户可提前十日无理由终止合同，服务商仅可在对方发生重大违约且三十日内未予补救时终止合同
termination.notice_period: 客户提前10天，服务商终止需满足重大违约且30日补救期届满的条件
termination.conditions: 客户可无理由提前10天通知终止；服务商仅可在对方发生重大违约且30日内未予补救时终止

clauses.content: {"amount": 420000, "currency": "USD", "payment_cycle": "按季度后付", "payment_method": null, "description": "客户应在收到有效发票后七十五日内按季度后付，合同总费用为USD 420,000"}

clauses.title: 违约责任
clauses.content: {"clause_title": "责任限制", "content": "服务商累计责任不超过合同履行前三个月已支付的费用，客户的付款义务不受上限限制"}

clauses.title: 违约责任
clauses.content: {"clause_title": "终止违约责任", "content": "客户可提前十日无理由终止合同，服务商仅可在对方发生重大违约且三十日内未予补救时终止合同"}

clauses.title: 争议解决
clauses.content: {"clause_title": "争议解决", "content": "争议提交新加坡国际仲裁中心（SIAC）仲裁，适用新加坡法律", "arbitration_institution": "新加坡国际仲裁中心（SIAC）", "jurisdiction": "新加坡"}

clauses.title: 保密义务
clauses.content: {"clause_title": "保密", "content": "双方应自保密信息披露之日起两年内承担保密义务", "duration": "2年"}

clauses.title: 知识产权
clauses.content: {"clause_title": "知识产权", "content": "既有材料归原权利人所有，专为客户开发的工作成果在客户全额付款后转让给客户", "scope": "合同项下的既有材料及专为客户端开发的工作成果"}

clauses.title: 终止条款
clauses.content: {"clause_title": "终止", "content": "客户可提前十日无理由终止合同，服务商仅可在对方发生重大违约且三十日内未予补救时终止合同", "notice_period": "客户提前10天，服务商终止需满足重大违约且30日补救期届满的条件", "conditions": "客户可无理由提前10天通知终止；服务商仅可在对方发生重大违约且30日内未予补救时终止"}

clauses.number: 第十三条 语言效力
clauses.title: 语言效力条款中英文直接冲突
clauses.content: If there is any inconsistency, the English version shall prevail. 如中英文存在不一致，以中文版本为准。

clauses.title: 责任限制条款显失公平权利义务失衡
clauses.content: Provider's aggregate liability shall not exceed fees paid in the preceding three months; however, Client's payment obligations are uncapped.

clauses.title: 合同解除权严重失衡显失公平
clauses.content: Client may terminate for convenience with ten days' notice. Provider may terminate only for material breach not cured within thirty days.

clauses.title: 数据保护条款约定不明存在合规风险
clauses.content: Provider may process personal data in approved regions and may use subcontractors for support, provided that it remains responsible for their acts.

clauses.number: 第四条 费用与付款
clauses.title: 付款账期过长且无逾期违约责任
clauses.content: Client shall pay quarterly in arrears within seventy-five (75) days after receiving a valid invoice.

clauses.title: 知识产权归属约定不明权益保障不足
clauses.content: Pre-existing materials remain owned by the original owner. Work product specifically developed for Client shall be assigned to Client upon full payment.

clauses.title: 保密期限过短不符合商业秘密保护要求
clauses.content: Each party shall protect confidential information for two (2) years after disclosure.

clauses.title: 服务水平约定模糊无违约追责机制
clauses.content: Provider will use commercially reasonable efforts to maintain 99.5% monthly availability. Critical incidents should be responded to within a reasonable time.

clauses.title: 变更请求条款对服务商无约束机制
clauses.content: Client may request changes at any time. Provider shall implement urgent changes first and discuss fee adjustments later.

clauses.title: 审计条款约定不明增加服务商合规成本
clauses.content: Client may audit Provider's systems upon five business days' notice no more than twice per year.

clauses.number: 争议解决条款（合同首部约定）
clauses.title: 争议解决条款对客户不利且约定不明
clauses.content: Governing Law / 法律：Laws of Singapore；Dispute / 争议：SIAC arbitration in Singapore

clauses.title: 合同变更未约定书面形式易引发争议
clauses.content: This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement and supersedes prior discussions.

clauses.title: 通知送达条款约定不合理易引发争议
clauses.content: Notices shall be sent to the addresses stated in the order form and are deemed received upon email delivery confirmation.
